use_cases: Showcasing client testimonials on an agency portfolio or services page
Displaying social proof on a product landing page
Highlighting customer quotes in a testimonial section on a business website
Featuring team member or partner endorsements in an about page section
Rotating through testimonial cards on a homepage or testimonial archive
ai_summary: An editorial-style testimonial carousel component with smooth fade transitions between quotes. Features professional headshots, author attribution, and navigation controls. Built with Next.js Image optimization and Lucide icons for a clean, minimalist presentation suitable for showcasing client testimonials or endorsements across various industry landing pages.
